location: Purchased for 600 Runes from the Nomadic Merchant camped beside the road between Mistwood Ruins and Fort Haight in eastern Limgrave's Mistwood.
tactics: Travel toward Fort Haight and follow the road southwest into Mistwood; the merchant sits by a campfire slightly northeast of a message marker on the roadside
Straight purchase, no fighting required — just bring 600 Runes
Several different Nomadic Merchants are scattered across the map selling different goods, so this is specifically the Mistwood one, not a generic vendor
lore: A small hatchet more at home splitting firewood than fighting a war, but its light weight lets it be swung again and again faster than a proper axe.

builds.name: Early quality build
builds.why: Low Strength/Dexterity requirements and even D/D scaling make it an easy first axe upgrade for almost any starting class.

builds.name: Quickstep dodge-poke
builds.why: Its Quickstep skill combines a dodge with a follow-up hit, useful for punishing an enemy right after evading their attack.
